description: Indiana Legal RAG evaluation dataset — labelled queries for offline metric computation (Recall@K, MRR, NDCG, faithfulness). Expand with real retrieved source_ids after first ingestion run.

examples.query: What is the mens rea required for murder under Indiana Code 35-42-1-1?
examples.notes: Statute lookup — expect citation_lookup query type, high BM25 weight

examples.query: Indiana Supreme Court cases on accomplice liability after 2015
What are the elements of negligence in Indiana tort law?
examples.notes: Pure semantic query — expect low BM25 weight

examples.query: Is a quitclaim deed valid without consideration in Indiana?
7th Circuit standard of review for summary judgment under Rule 56
examples.notes: Federal procedure query; should surface 7th Circuit opinions

examples.query: Indiana child custody best interests of the child standard I.C. 31-17-2-8
examples.notes: Statute lookup with section citation — citation_lookup query type

examples.query: Define battery under Indiana law and compare to assault
Indiana Tax Court on property tax assessment exempt nonprofit organizations
examples.notes: Indiana Tax Court specific — should prefer indctapp/indtc sources
